name: Jerry Seinfeld

acts.description: Dated Shoshanna Lonstein when she was 17 and he was 38; relationship was public and he has never expressed regret

behavior_summary: Began dating 17-year-old Shoshanna Lonstein in 1993 when he was 38, at the height of Seinfeld's fame. The relationship was public, photographed by paparazzi, and considered unremarkable at the time.

art.summary: One of the most successful comedians in history. Seinfeld redefined the American sitcom and his stand-up remains influential.

verdict.blurb: At 38 and the most famous comedian in America, he started dating a 17-year-old. She was in high school. He was on the cover of every magazine. Nobody batted an eye. We're batting an eye now.
